place: AYANA Heights, Cherngtalay, Choeng Thale, Thalang District, Phuket 83110, Thailand
title: AYANA Heights Seaview Residence — Penthouse D701 near Layan Beach
blurb: The top-floor D701 penthouse at AYANA Heights, a hillside sea-view condominium above Layan Beach at the northern end of Bang Tao. 400 m² in total — 280 m² of indoor living plus a 120 m² wraparound terrace and private pool — laid out over three bedrooms, a separate office and five bathrooms, all opening to the Andaman Sea. Off-plan, completing Q2 2027.
detail:
Penthouse D701 is the crowning residence at AYANA Heights Seaview Residence, a new luxury condominium set on a hillside in the Layan Beach area, at the northern end of Bang Tao on Phuket's unspoiled west coast. Occupying the top of building D, it spans 400 m² in all: 280 m² of air-conditioned interior wrapped by a 120 m² terrace with its own swimming pool, positioned to take in the sweep of the Andaman Sea and the island's sunsets.

The plan is generous and clearly zoned. An open living, dining and kitchen pavilion runs the width of the home and slides open to the terrace, while a separate office sits off the hall for those who work from the island. Three bedrooms — including a full master suite — are served by five bathrooms, finished in natural stone with freestanding tubs and walk-in rain showers. Interiors pair warm timber joinery with pale stone and a restrained, contemporary palette.

Residents share the full AYANA Heights resort amenity set — general and private pools, a gym, sauna and yoga zone, coworking and library spaces, a children's room and playground, a conference room, secure parking, and 24-hour security with professional property management. Moments from Layan's beaches and the Laguna lifestyle hub, D701 is a rare top-floor home that lives like a villa in the sky. Off-plan, with completion scheduled for Q2 2027.

Penthouse D-701 — 85,000,000 THB, freehold or leasehold. All images for reference only; the developer reserves the right to modify specifications.
